title: NHKマイルCの後に・さらに高みへ

text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki performs incredibly well at the NHK
Mile Cup.

The audience is utterly captivated by her miracle.
The younger student's depression and anger
begin to lift as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki wants to inspire people even more. To
do so, she wants to enter the Mile
Championship—the race where the autumn queen
of the mile is decided and where she'll also have
to face senior-year racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the next race on our schedule is the Mile
Championship.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our race through the summer toward the Mile
Championship and the strong opponents waiting
there begins now!
